hints: Verbo: soler (acción habitual en el pasado)
Verbo: investigar (gerundio o participio, método de preparación)
hintDisplay: Sujeto: Yo / Verbo: soler (acción habitual en el pasado) / Verbo: preparar (infinitivo después de 'soler') / Complemento: para entrevistas de trabajo / Verbo: investigar (gerundio o participio, método de preparación) / Complemento: la empresa a fondo
spanishSentence: Solía prepararme para entrevistas de trabajo investigando la empresa a fondo.
correctSentence: I used to prepare for job interviews by researching the company thoroughly.

spanishSentence: Solíamos integrar a los nuevos empleados con un proceso de documentación largo, pero ahora lo hacemos digitalmente.
correctSentence: We used to onboard new employees with a lengthy paperwork process, but now we do it digitally.

hints: Complemento: capacitar a los nuevos empleados
hintDisplay: Sujeto: La empresa / Verbo: usar (hábito pasado) / Complemento: capacitar a los nuevos empleados / Complemento: de manera exhaustiva / Tiempo: antes vs. ahora

correctSentence: The company didn't use to train new employees as thoroughly as it does now.

correctSentence: They didn't use to answer technical questions during job interviews.

spanishSentence: Solía prepararme para entrevistas de trabajo investigando exhaustivamente la empresa y practicando preguntas comunes.
correctSentence: I used to prepare for job interviews by researching the company thoroughly and practicing common questions.

spanishSentence: Solíamos preseleccionar candidatos basándonos únicamente en su CV, pero ahora realizamos primero entrevistas telefónicas iniciales.
correctSentence: We used to shortlist candidates based only on their CV, but now we conduct initial phone screenings first.

correctSentence: I used to schedule job interviews every Monday morning when I worked in the HR department.

correctSentence: We used to shortlist candidates based only on their CV, but now we also consider their online presence.

correctSentence: I used to practice job interview questions every day before my first interview.

spanishSentence: Solía evaluar a los candidatos basándome únicamente en sus calificaciones, pero ahora también considero sus habilidades blandas y su compatibilidad cultural.
correctSentence: I used to evaluate candidates based solely on their qualifications, but now I consider their soft skills and cultural fit as well.

spanishSentence: La empresa solía rechazar a los candidatos que no tenían al menos cinco años de experiencia.
correctSentence: The company used to reject candidates who didn't have at least five years of experience.

correctSentence: I didn't use to contact candidates by phone, but now that's our main communication method.

spanishSentence: No solía estar nervioso durante entrevistas de trabajo, pero ahora me presento con más confianza.
correctSentence: I didn't use to be nervous during job interviews, but now I present myself with more confidence.
